transition.intent: Move to template-maintenance only after context hygiene, SBOM/provenance modes, and BuildKit secret mount guidance are stable.
transition.validation_command: bash -n scripts/build-image.sh scripts/push-image.sh scripts/validate-build-plan.sh tests/validate-build-plan.test.sh && scripts/validate-build-plan.sh && bash tests/validate-build-plan.test.sh
transition.transition_validation_command: bash -n scripts/build-image.sh scripts/push-image.sh scripts/validate-build-plan.sh tests/validate-build-plan.test.sh && scripts/validate-build-plan.sh && bash tests/validate-build-plan.test.sh
transition.decision_rule: All required gates must be passed, machine-checkable, or waived before changing current_phase.

phase_model.purpose: Establish public-safe Docker build validation and image metadata defaults.
Document context hygiene, SBOM/provenance modes, and BuildKit secret mount guidance.
blocked_work: credential handling beyond documented template guidance

phase_model.purpose: Maintain the public Docker build template after readiness gates are complete.
blocked_work: new supply-chain scope without an explicit phase

required_gates.description: Docker build context hygiene, including .dockerignore boundaries, must be documented for public template users.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in context-provenance-hardening and document build context boundaries before moving to template-maintenance.

required_gates.description: SBOM, provenance, and attestation modes must be documented with safe public defaults.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in context-provenance-hardening and document SBOM/provenance modes before moving to template-maintenance.

required_gates.description: BuildKit secret mount guidance must exist so credentials are not passed through build arguments, labels, or copied files.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in context-provenance-hardening and document BuildKit secret mount guidance before moving to template-maintenance.
